report.summary: Design polish for 2 new learn guides (MiCA EU Regulation, DVT Guide): created OG images, fixed responsive typography, improved mobile table scrolling, enlarged touch targets, added focus-visible accessibility, and fixed client/server component metadata issues.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: MiCA page: Fixed 'use client' directive conflicting with metadata export — converted to server component, restoring proper SEO metadata
Both pages: Replaced fixed h1 fontSize (42px) with responsive clamp(28px, 5vw, 42px) for proper mobile rendering
Both pages: Replaced fixed article padding (40px 20px) with responsive clamp() values for better mobile spacing
Both pages: Enlarged badge touch targets from 6px/12px padding to 8px/16px with minHeight 36px for WCAG 2.1 compliance
MiCA page: Wrapped 2 data tables in overflow-x scroll containers for mobile horizontal scrolling
DVT page: Replaced inline onMouseEnter/onMouseLeave hover handlers with CSS class (hover-underline) enabling server component conversion
Global: Added focus-visible outline styles (2px solid #6366f1) for keyboard navigation accessibility across all pages
DVT page: Standardized import path note — uses @/components/seo vs MiCA's @/lib/seo (flagged for future normalization)

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: mica-eu-crypto-regulation-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — EU shield icon, regulation timeline visualization, MiCA compliance badge, dark theme with blue accent palette
OG image: distributed-validator-technology-dvt-guide (1200x630 SVG) — DVT node mesh diagram, key splitting icon, SSV/Obol stats bar, dark theme with purple/ethereum accent palette

sections.title: Metadata Fixes
items: MiCA page: Added openGraph.images and twitter.images pointing to new OG SVG
DVT page: Added openGraph.images and twitter.images pointing to new OG SVG
Both pages: Added ' | degen0x' suffix to metadata title for consistent branding

sections.title: Files Modified
items: src/app/learn/mica-eu-crypto-regulation-guide-2026/page.tsx — metadata, responsive styles, table wrappers, badge sizing
src/app/learn/distributed-validator-technology-dvt-guide/page.tsx — metadata with OG images, responsive styles, badge sizing, hover CSS
